text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One night...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sorry I'm late, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey! I've been waitin' for ya!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So? What'd you call me out here for? I came here
ready to run with everythin' I've got.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Do you really gotta ask? You 'n' I are gonna race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The route'll be a single right-handed lap startin'
from here and endin' over there. That'll make this
a 2,500-meter race.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wait a second! That direction and distance...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's right. This is gonna be our Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I mean, the real deal has that big ol' hill, but
runnin' the same distance should give us a good
taste o' the actual race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I keep on losin' to ya. Plus, I heard you're gonna
run in the Tokyo Daishoten this year.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Since you're not gonna be in the Arima Kinen,
that means this is my only chance to try 'n' beat
ya this year.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So, Inari One? Ya gonna take up my challenge or
what?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heh. Do ya really gotta ask?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'm missin' out on our exclusive
Arima Kinen! Gimme all ya got, White Lightning!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Don't ya dare hold back on me either!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Now let's get started! Time for our Grand Prix!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Not bad, Tama! Your runnin's gotten even
sharper than before!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What's da matter, Inari? Don't have what it takes
to beat me?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: As if! I'm just gettin' started!

text_block_list.name: Inari & Tamamo
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Hehe! This's what I'm talkin' 'bout! I'm burnin' up
inside, and my body's screamin' at me, but I'm
havin' so much fun that I might burst out laughin'!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (Tama! I'll never forget racin' with ya today!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (I never wanna forget!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm eventually gonna make a big announcement
'bout it, but you can be the first to know.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm plannin' to go on a li'l break after the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Anyway... I'm real glad I got to run with ya.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Inari. I'll never forget our race today.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Tama...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You'd better come back after your break, ya
hear?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm not through competin' against ya just yet. I
won't be able to rest easy till we put on an even
bigger and grander festival together!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna make the tracks burn so hot, you'll be
itchin' to come back as soon as possible!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Haha! That don't sound half bad!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Just keep my spot nice 'n' warm for me, yeah? I'll
be watchin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Run out there like ya mean it, Inari! I better not
see ya slackin' on the track while I'm gone!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You betcha!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I should be the one thankin' you, dummy.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross—Japan's one and only White
Lightning!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I hereby take up the flame ya lit!
